mapper.select: SELECT mac.*, ma.master_channel_name, ma.account_name FROM margin_account_channel mac LEFT JOIN margin_account ma ON mac.margin_account_id = ma.id WHERE mac.code = #{code} AND mac.deleted = 0 AND ma.deleted = 0
SELECT DISTINCT margin_account_id FROM margin_account_channel WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND deleted = 0
